name: The Root
flavor: Something ancient stirs beneath the soil. Where its roots spread, the land remembers how to fight back.

passives.name: The Web Remembers
passives.flavor: Where roots intertwine, the land whispers of what was lost. Invaders feel it in their bones.
passives.description: Each turn, generate Fear equal to the number of adjacent Presence pairs (each pair counted twice).

passives.name: Tangled Earth
passives.flavor: The ground itself resists. Every step is a struggle through grasping soil.
passives.description: Invaders adjacent to 2+ Presence territories have −1 Advance movement.

passives.name: Protector's Call
passives.flavor: The spirit's roots stir the Natives to action. In its shadow, they will not stand idle.
passives.description: Natives in Presence territories counter-attack on every invader action, not just Ravage.

passives.name: Deep Breath
passives.flavor: Even in stillness, the roots creep forward. Rest is not weakness — it is growth.
passives.description: On Rest, place 1 free Presence on any territory with existing Presence.

passives.name: Nothing Truly Dies
passives.flavor: What the Root sacrifices does not vanish. It sleeps, waiting to be called again.
passives.description: Playing a bottom makes the card Dormant instead of dissolving it. Awaken effects restore dormant cards.

passives.name: The Land Reclaims
passives.flavor: When the tide ebbs, the roots pull everything back into the earth.
passives.description: At Resolution, all invaders adjacent to Presence territories are removed. Each reduces Corruption by 1.

cards.name: Tendrils of Reclamation

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points in range 1

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 5 points in range 2, and restore 1 Weave

cards.design_note: Starter cleanse. Top counters one Ravage exactly (2 pts vs 2 pts). Bottom worth dissolving at 6-7 pts corruption.

cards.name: Deep Roots

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 3, then reduce Corruption by 2 points in that territory

cards.design_note: Presence placement starter. Bottom is emergency reach — range 3 means anywhere on the pyramid.

cards.name: Earthen Mending

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points anywhere on the board

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 4 points anywhere, and reduce Corruption by 2 points in an adjacent territory

cards.design_note: Range-0 cleanse. Double Root is best threshold fuel — with any other Root card gives Root x3+.

cards.name: Shiver of the Ancient

bottom.desc: Generate 7 Fear

cards.design_note: Primary fear card. Bottom's 7 Fear is nearly 1.5 Fear Actions.

cards.name: The Forest Remembers

bottom.desc: Deal 4 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1, then generate 2 Fear

cards.design_note: Fear + damage hybrid. Bottom's 4 damage + presence amplification kills Marchers and Outriders.

cards.name: Spreading Growth

bottom.desc: Place 2 Presence, each in different territories in range 2

cards.design_note: Pure network expansion. Double Root means Root x4 with bottom doubling — guaranteed tier 1.

cards.name: Healing Earth

bottom.desc: Restore 3 Weave and reduce Corruption by 2 points anywhere

cards.design_note: Only dedicated Weave recovery in starting deck.

cards.name: Stir the Sleeping

bottom.desc: Awaken all dormant cards in hand, then generate 2 Fear per card awakened

cards.design_note: Root's hand quality card. Becomes MORE valuable as dormant cards accumulate.

cards.name: Living Wall

bottom.desc: Deal 5 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1, and shield all Natives in that territory (Shield 2)

cards.design_note: Defensive combat card. 5 damage + presence amplification kills Ironclads.

cards.name: Grasping Roots

top.desc: Roots erupt, dealing 2 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1

bottom.desc: Roots entangle everything in range 2. Deal 3 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 2. All invaders in that territory have their Advance halved next Tide.

cards.design_note: Root's only repeatable damage top (D29). 2 + presence amplification = 3+ damage. Double Root feeds threshold engine.

cards.name: Ancient Pulse

bottom.desc: Restore 2 Weave, generate 3 Fear, and place 1 Presence in range 1

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Utility card — flexibility pick for off-element diversity.

cards.name: Reclaim the Soil

top.desc: Place 1 Presence at any existing Presence token (reinforce a territory)

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 6 points in range 1, then place 1 Presence in range 1

cards.design_note: DRAFT (D29). Strong presence stacking + biggest single-target cleanse in Dormant pool.

cards.name: Rootbound

top.desc: Place 2 Presence at existing Presence (reinforce one territory with 2 tokens)

bottom.desc: Generate Fear equal to 2 x the number of Presence tokens in the highest-presence territory, then restore 1 Weave

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Network payoff — scales with presence density. Build-defining for wide-network runs.

cards.name: Vast Network

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 3. This turn, Network Fear counts adjacency twice for all Presence territories.

cards.design_note: Draft-only deep network card. Temporary Network Fear doubling on bottom.

cards.name: Whisper of Roots

bottom.desc: Generate 3 Fear and reduce Corruption by 1 point in all Presence territories

cards.design_note: Gentle sustain draft card. Board-wide cleanse rewards wide presence.

cards.name: Creeping Vines

bottom.desc: Move 1 Presence up to 2 territories. All invaders in range 2 have their Advance movement halved this Tide.

cards.design_note: Awakened — MovePresence + SlowInvaders. Gale element unusual for Root.

cards.name: Dread Awakening

bottom.desc: Generate 9 Fear. The next Fear Action drawn this encounter is from the next Dread Level pool.

cards.design_note: Fear engine card. Double Shadow hits Shadow tier 1 from a single bottom play.

cards.name: Verdant Restoration

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points in range 2

bottom.desc: Remove one full Corruption level from one territory in range 1. Restore 2 Weave.

cards.design_note: Only Purify in Root pool. Double Mist hits Mist tier 1 on bottom.

cards.name: Ancient Communion

top.desc: Give all Natives in range 1 Shield 2 until end of next Tide

bottom.desc: Shield 2 all Natives in range 2. All Natives in range 2 deal +2 damage on their counter-attack this Tide.

cards.design_note: Native interaction card. Boosted + shielded Natives deal 5 damage each.

cards.name: Root Terror

bottom.desc: Generate 3 Fear. Push up to 2 invaders in range 2 back toward their spawn point.

cards.design_note: Fear + disruption. Push from M-row to A-row buys a full turn.

cards.name: Boundless Growth

bottom.desc: Place 3 Presence anywhere in range 2 (can be split across territories)

cards.design_note: Triple Root contributes 6 on bottom — hits tier 1 and nearly tier 2.

cards.name: Rise, Ancient One

bottom.desc: Awaken 2 dormant cards. For each card awakened, choose: play its top immediately for free, or return it to hand.

cards.design_note: Most decision-dense bottom in the deck. Three elements = 6 total on bottom.

cards.name: Lattice of Life

top.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 1. For each adjacent territory that also has Presence, generate 2 Fear.

bottom.desc: Place 2 Presence in range 2. Double Network Fear passive for the rest of this encounter.

cards.design_note: Ancient. Bottom's permanent Network Fear doubling is build-defining.

cards.name: The Deep Remembers

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 3 in range 1. If this drops Tainted to Clean, generate 3 Fear.

bottom.desc: Fully cleanse one territory in range 2 (0 Corruption). Generate Fear equal to Corruption level cleared x 4.

cards.design_note: Ancient. Full cleanse + scaling Fear. Clearing Desecrated = 12 Fear.

cards.name: Living Forest

top.desc: Shield 3 all Natives in range 2. Surviving Natives with Shield 3 gain +1 permanent HP this encounter.

bottom.desc: All Natives fully heal. Each Native deals double counter-attack damage for rest of encounter. Generate 1 Fear per living Native.

cards.design_note: Ancient Native build-around. 6 Natives = 6 Fear + permanent double damage.
